features.name: Legacy Config Removal & Migration
features.gap_analysis: We have basic config loading with .env and YAML. This adds breaking change management, migration support, and doctor --fix tooling.

features.name: Config Schema JSON Enrichment
features.gap_analysis: We have basic config validation via Pydantic. This adds field titles, descriptions, and editor integration.

features.name: Raw Config View Preservation
features.gap_analysis: We have config loading. This adds snapshot integrity when sensitive fields are blank.

features.name: Built-in Video Generation Tool
features.gap_analysis: We have no native video generation. This adds video_generate tool with provider abstraction (xAI, Alibaba, Runway).

features.name: Built-in Music Generation Tool
features.gap_analysis: We have no native music generation. This adds music_generate tool with Google Lyria, MiniMax, Comfy workflow support.

features.name: Claude CLI MCP Bridge
features.gap_analysis: We have VP agent delegation. This adds loopback MCP bridge for exposing tools to Claude CLI runs.

features.name: Structured Progress Events
features.gap_analysis: We have basic execution tracking. This adds structured plan updates and execution item events for UI.

features.name: Prompt Cache Diagnostics
features.gap_analysis: We have basic caching. This adds cache break diagnostics and reuse visibility in status.

features.name: ComfyUI Workflow Plugin
features.gap_analysis: We have no ComfyUI integration. This adds local ComfyUI + Comfy Cloud workflow support for image/video/music.

features.name: New Provider Bundles (Qwen, Fireworks, StepFun)
features.gap_analysis: We have basic provider routing. This adds bundled provider configs for Qwen, Fireworks, StepFun.

features.name: Amazon Bedrock Mantle Support
features.gap_analysis: We have no Bedrock integration. This adds Mantle support, inference-profile discovery, and auto region injection.

features.name: Provider Request Overrides
features.gap_analysis: We have basic provider config. This adds headers, auth, proxy, TLS controls across OpenAI/Anthropic/Google paths.

features.name: Claude CLI Security Hardening
features.our_counterpart: src/universal_agent/vp/ (if we shell to Claude CLI)
features.gap_analysis: We have basic VP isolation. This adds clearing inherited env overrides and preventing config-root/plugin-root attacks.

features.name: Plugin Tool Allowlist Enforcement
features.gap_analysis: We have basic tool filtering. This adds plugin-only allowlists and owner access for allowlist management.

features.name: Gateway Auth Throttling
features.gap_analysis: We have basic gateway auth. This adds origin-scoped auth throttling.

features.name: Memory Dreaming System
features.gap_analysis: We have basic memory storage. This adds three-phase dreaming (light, deep, REM), weighted recall promotion, and dreams.md.

features.name: Memory Aging Controls
features.gap_analysis: We have no aging controls. This adds recencyHalfLifeDays, maxAgeDays, and verbose logging.

features.name: Amazon Bedrock Embeddings
features.gap_analysis: We have basic embeddings. This adds Bedrock-specific embeddings (Titan, Cohere, Nova, TwelveLabs).

features.name: Embedded ACP Runtime
features.gap_analysis: We have no ACP support. This adds embedded ACP runtime and reply_dispatch hook.

features.name: Reply Dispatch Hook
features.gap_analysis: We have hook system. This adds generic reply interception hook for bundled plugins.

features.name: Plugin Config TUI Prompts
features.gap_analysis: We have basic plugin config. This adds guided onboarding with TUI prompts.

features.name: Lobster In-Process Execution
features.gap_analysis: We have no Lobster integration. This adds in-process Lobster workflow execution.

features.name: ClawHub Integration in Control UI
features.gap_analysis: We have ClawHub CLI skill. This adds in-UI search, detail, and install flows.

features.name: Skills JSON Output to Stdout
features.gap_analysis: We have skills commands. This adds proper stdout routing for JSON output.

features.name: Matrix Exec Approvals
features.gap_analysis: We have no Matrix integration. This adds Matrix-native exec approval prompts.

features.name: Exec Host Routing
features.gap_analysis: We have basic exec routing. This adds clearer host exec policy routing and blocked override errors.

features.name: Context Visibility Controls
features.gap_analysis: We have basic channel context. This adds per-channel contextVisibility (all, allowlist, allowlist_quote).

features.name: Telegram Fixes
features.gap_analysis: We have basic Telegram integration. This adds model picker fixes, HTML formatting, reaction persistence, and voice note transcription.

features.name: Cron Replay on Restart
features.gap_analysis: We have basic cron service. This adds replay of interrupted recurring jobs on first gateway restart.

features.name: Cron Failure Notifications
features.gap_analysis: We have basic cron execution. This adds failure notifications through job's primary delivery channel.

features.name: Multilingual Control UI
features.gap_analysis: We have English-only UI. This adds 12 language support (Chinese, Portuguese, German, Spanish, Japanese, Korean, French, Turkish, Indonesian, Polish, Ukrainian).

features.name: Dreams UI
features.gap_analysis: We have no dreams UI. This adds Dream Diary surface with lobster animation.

features.name: Provider Compatibility Fixes
features.gap_analysis: We have basic provider routing. This adds preservation of native vendor behavior across Anthropic/Mistral/Moonshot/OpenRouter/xAI/Z.ai.

features.name: Kimi Web Search Base URL Inheritance
features.gap_analysis: We have no Kimi integration. This adds base URL inheritance for Moonshot chat.

features.name: iOS Exec Approvals
features.gap_analysis: Platform-specific iOS feature.

features.name: Android Talk Mode Fixes
features.gap_analysis: Platform-specific Android feature.

features.name: Mobile Pairing Security
features.gap_analysis: Platform-specific Android feature.

recurring_gaps.rationale: Third consecutive appearance with significant enhancements (three-phase system, aging controls, REM preview tooling). Now a mature feature addressing critical memory gap.
Second appearance with expanded provider support (xAI, Alibaba, Runway, Lyria, MiniMax). Significant capability gap.
Second appearance with workflow-backed media generation. Enables flexible local/cloud media creation.
